title: Fermented German Vegetable Salad
description: A hearty salad featuring fermented cabbage and German flavors. Perfect for a cold winter evening.

ingredients.name: mixed vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as carrots, beets, and onions

instructions: Shred the fermented cabbage and place in a large bowl.
In a small bowl, whisk together the german mustard and a pinch of salt.
Pour the mustard mixture over the cabbage and toss to combine.
Cut the chewy rye bread into small cubes and toast until crispy.
Add the toasted bread croutons and mixed vegetables to the cabbage mixture.
Toss to combine and adjust seasoning as needed.
If desired, top with crumble cheese and serve immediately.
